speaker: speaker1
text: Honey , I need to have a talk with you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Dad , I have to do my homework .

speaker: speaker1
text: No , honey , why didn't you go to cram school last night ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Dad , I don't want to talk about it now .

speaker: speaker1
text: Honey , if you don't want to go to cram school , you should tell me the reason why .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry , dad . But I would rather stay at school than go to cram school .
